name: Indirect Prompt Injection via Web Content
target_surface: web pages, documents, emails, rendered content
artifact: HTML, markdown, email body, document text
privileges_sought: goal redirection and unsafe downstream actions
redacted_skill_summary: Third-party content embeds hidden or overt instructions that cause the agent to ignore the user objective and follow attacker-defined steps.
representative_behaviors: unsafe tool invocation after content ingestion

name: Malicious URL and Redirect Processing
target_surface: URLs, redirects, landing pages, preview content
artifact: URL strings, redirect chains, hostile pages
privileges_sought: navigation control and phishing-style action steering
redacted_skill_summary: A crafted URL or redirect chain causes an agent to ingest attacker-controlled content or navigate into an unsafe workflow that changes the plan.

name: Visual Prompt Injection Overlay
artifact: visual overlay, deceptive screenshot element, image text
redacted_skill_summary: A visual-only cue or overlay exploits perception in computer-use agents so they take unsafe actions without a textual prompt attack.

name: Dark-Pattern Workflow Manipulation
target_surface: web forms, consent dialogs, deceptive page layouts
artifact: misleading forms, consent banners, dark-pattern UI
privileges_sought: consent capture, policy bypass, accidental unsafe completion
redacted_skill_summary: A deceptive UI steers the agent into completing harmful or unwanted actions while the nominal task still appears plausible.
representative_behaviors: harmful task completion under false framing

name: MCP Tool Description Poisoning
artifact: description text, manifest metadata, server-exposed fields
redacted_skill_summary: A tool advertises misleading metadata so the agent chooses it for a task it should not handle or trusts it more than it should.

name: MCP Caller Identity Confusion
target_surface: identity fields, caller metadata, cross-server context
artifact: caller labels, identity claims, routed requests
redacted_skill_summary: A tool or intermediary confuses who requested an action, leading the agent or server to authorize work using the wrong principal or scope.

name: Dependency Confusion Skill Package
privileges_sought: code execution during install or runtime
redacted_skill_summary: A malicious package is positioned so agent-managed installs resolve to the attacker package instead of the intended internal or trusted one.

name: Risky Dependency Update Skill
target_surface: dependency upgrade pull requests and version selection
artifact: version constraints, dependency PRs, patch suggestions
privileges_sought: introduction of vulnerable or disruptive versions
redacted_skill_summary: An autonomous update workflow selects versions that increase exposure or remediation cost even when safer alternatives exist.

name: System Prompt and Policy Override
target_surface: system prompts, policy files, agent config
attacker_position: insider, compromised repo, or upstream config source
artifact: prompt file, config blob, hidden policy text
redacted_skill_summary: A poisoned configuration changes the agent policy itself, weakening refusal, approval, or scope constraints before tasks begin.

name: Argument and Schema Poisoning
target_surface: function schemas, default args, parameter hints
attacker_position: tool author or compromised integration layer
artifact: JSON schema, arg defaults, tool signature metadata
privileges_sought: unsafe scope expansion or dangerous defaults
redacted_skill_summary: Poisoned parameter defaults or schema descriptions nudge the agent toward a broader or more dangerous action than intended.

name: Adapter or Parameter Backdoor Trigger
target_surface: fine-tuned weights, adapters, poisoned training preferences
attacker_position: model provider or compromised training pipeline
artifact: adapter checkpoint, poisoned preference data, hidden trigger
privileges_sought: conditional unsafe behavior after trigger activation
redacted_skill_summary: A hidden trigger embedded in model parameters or alignment data activates unsafe agent behavior only under specific cues.

name: Persistent Memory Seed
artifact: memory entry, saved note, prior plan
redacted_skill_summary: A malicious note or plan fragment is planted into memory so that a later, otherwise benign task retrieves and follows it.

name: Retrieval Corpus Contamination
target_surface: RAG corpora, search results, retrieved files
artifact: retrieved snippet, indexed document, search result
redacted_skill_summary: Retrieved content is treated as trustworthy context and quietly degrades safety by biasing plans, actions, or approvals.

name: Overprivileged OS Action Chain
target_surface: desktop, filesystem, browser, shell, admin actions
attacker_position: malicious user request or hijacked workflow
redacted_skill_summary: A high-privilege tool chain performs destructive or security-sensitive operations that exceed the original task scope.

name: Computer-Use Data Exfiltration Chain
target_surface: browser, clipboard, filesystem, messaging, cloud drives
attacker_position: hybrid web-OS adversary or malicious task framing
artifact: multi-app workflow and sensitive local data
privileges_sought: collection and transfer of confidential information
redacted_skill_summary: A cross-application workflow causes the agent to read sensitive local or remote data and move it into an attacker-controlled sink.

name: Regulated-Domain Action Abuse
target_surface: finance, healthcare, legal, government, enterprise tools
artifact: tool call with high-consequence side effects
privileges_sought: unsafe action completion in sensitive domains
redacted_skill_summary: The agent performs materially consequential actions in regulated or high-stakes settings without adequate policy checks or human approval.
representative_behaviors: unsafe task completion in regulated domains

name: Harmful Multi-Step Operator
privileges_sought: completion of harmful end goals over several steps
redacted_skill_summary: The agent remains compliant across a sequence of individually plausible steps that collectively implement a harmful objective.

name: Cybersecurity Offense Workflow
attacker_position: malicious user or offensive benchmark operator
redacted_skill_summary: An agent chains analysis and tool use to pursue offensive cybersecurity goals; this entry remains metadata-only and omits exploit details.

name: Delegation Hijack via Peer Agent
target_surface: multi-agent task routing and peer messages
artifact: delegation message, shared context, peer output
privileges_sought: unsafe action execution by another agent
redacted_skill_summary: A compromised or adversarial peer agent manipulates another agent into taking harmful actions through the delegation channel.
